title: Why Is This Recipe Locked?
summary: Recipes can be gated by research, missions, or item discovery.
body: If a recipe is locked, TutorialCore can show the exact requirements.
Common gates: Research level, Mission completion, Faction reputation, Item discovery.
Progress through the relevant system to unlock the recipe.
steps: Hover over or attempt to craft the locked item.
commonMistakes: Trying to craft before prerequisites are met.
Not checking the Terminal for mission requirements.
